abilities.name: Black Blood
abilities.description: All characters without Black Blood within 1 yard suffer 1 damage when this character suffers damage.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: When enemy ends push or move within engagement range not part of Walk/Charge, may immediately take (1) AP Close Combat attack.

abilities.name: Grow
abilities.description: If kills Living non-Nephilim with y attack, may feast on remains to become Young Nephilim. All damage and Conditions removed.

actions: (1) Blackened Claws (Martial Arts) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/4 damage.
(0) Sprint (Athletics) | Character may discard card to take Walk Action.
system.notes: Youngest Nephilim. Small size belies ruthlessness. Cannot yet fly. Use hooves to spring at enemies. Hunt in packs. Feed on corpses to grow into Young Nephilim.
